notes: Core breakout mechanics work well with proper brick collision, paddle angle control, lives, levels, and scoring, but the ball launch angle (240-300°) sometimes sends it nearly horizontal and the brick gap calculation has a minor edge case; overall a solid, functional build.
Excellent core mechanics and collision, but overlay text fails to clear when launching the ball after losing a life or advancing a level, leaving distracting text on screen during gameplay.
A solid and fully recognizable Breakout build, but not close to flawless due to simplistic collision handling, minor state/UI inconsistencies, and somewhat basic game feel.
